summary: Added 3 output channels for scheduled mode: (1) per-file processing log to output/file_logs/, (2) daily append CSV to output/reports/processed_{date}.csv, (3) daily run heartbeat to output/logs/runs_{date}.log. Added scheduled_mode parameter to __init__. setup_logging() uses TimedRotatingFileHandler in scheduled mode. main() passes scheduled_mode=not args.watch. All watch mode behavior preserved.
